name: §6Phoenix
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Strength: §c60
§7Intelligence: §b150

§6Rekindle
§7Before death, become §eimmune §7and
§7gain §c30 ❁ Strength §7for §a4 §7seconds
§860s cooldown

§6Fourth Flare
§7On 4th melee strike, §6ignite §7mobs,
§7dealing §c15x §7your §9☠ Crit Damage
§7each second for §a5 §7seconds

§6Magic Bird
§7You may always fly on your private
§7island and garden

§6Eternal Coins
§7Don't lose coins from death.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Flamingo Phoenix Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aPhoenix§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
